name: Rosemary Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: Red Bartlett Pear, Cored and Shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise, chopped parsley, fresh rosemary leaves, and white pepper.
2. Add the cooked turkey and apple (cored and shredded). Toss gently until combined.
3. Cover and chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
4. Place lettuce leaves on individual serving plates.
5. Top each plate with half a cup of alfalfa sprouts.
6. Spoon half of the turkey mixture onto each plate and serve immediately.
